name: Capstone Starter (Codespaces fallback)
postCreateCommand: bash -c 'set -e; [ -f .env ] || cp .env.example .env; sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends make postgresql-client; pip install --user uv'
postStartCommand: bash -c 'set -e; if [ -n "$CODESPACE_NAME" ]; then touch .env; for spec in AIRFLOW_BASE_URL:8080 MLFLOW_BASE_URL:5000; do KEY=${spec%:*}; PORT=${spec#*:}; URL="https://${CODESPACE_NAME}-${PORT}.${GITHUB_CODESPACES_PORT_FORWARDING_DOMAIN}"; grep -q "^$KEY=" .env && sed -i "s#^$KEY=.*#$KEY=$URL#" .env || echo "$KEY=$URL" >> .env; echo "Set $KEY=$URL"; done; echo "If the stack is already up, restart it with: make down && make up"; fi'

postAttachCommand.hint: echo 'Run: make up   (then open the forwarded ports for the Airflow and MLflow UIs)'
